## Quality checklist

- [ ] Any AI-generated code has been reviewed line-by-line by the human PR author, who stands by it.
- [ ] Tests added or updated (unit + integration as appropriate).
- [ ] `just lint && just test` passes locally.
- [ ] No breaking changes — or, if unavoidable, called out in the description and CHANGELOG.
- [ ] PR title reads well in a release changelog.
